source.title: PDD Holdings Take Rate Analysis - Multiple Analyst Sources

extractions.claim: PDD's blended take rate for FY2025 is approximately 4.8-5.4% depending on GMV estimate used, up from ~3.6% in FY2021
extractions.evidence: FY2025 revenue: RMB 431.8B. Analyst GMV estimates for PDD consolidated: RMB 8-9T range (domestic ~RMB 5T + Temu ~RMB 500-650B in USD terms = ~RMB 3.5-4.6T equivalent). Using domestic GMV ~RMB 5T (Bernstein Q1 2025 domestic GMV growth 17-18% applied to ~RMB 4.05T 2023 base implies ~RMB 5.5T in 2025) + Temu ~$70B (~RMB 500B): Total GMV ~RMB 6T. Take rate = 431.8/6,000 = ~7.2%. However, this is misleading because Temu revenue is recorded gross. Adjusting for Temu gross vs net: Pinduoduo domestic take rate = OMS revenue / domestic GMV = 217.8B / 5,500B = ~4.0%.

verification.verifier_notes: GMV is not disclosed by PDD. Domestic GMV estimate based on Bernstein Q1 2025 growth rates applied to 2023 base. Take rate calculation is approximate. Bernstein estimated PDD take rate at 4.2% in FY2023.

extractions.claim: Temu operates at a fundamentally different take rate structure: 35-40% under fully-managed, low double-digits under semi-managed
extractions.evidence: Bernstein estimates ~35% of GMV for Temu under fully managed model, ~40% under fully managed in some estimates, and low double digits under semi-managed model. In US market, composition is approximately 60% fully managed, 30% semi-managed, 10% local-to-local as of H1 2025.

verification.verifier_notes: Bernstein analyst estimates widely cited across multiple sources

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo domestic OMS growth deceleration (Q4 +5%) signals domestic ad monetization approaching saturation at ~4% take rate
extractions.evidence: OMS quarterly growth trajectory in 2025: Q1 +15%, Q2 +13%, Q3 +8%, Q4 +5%. Bernstein SocGen downgraded PDD citing 'maturing domestic business' with 'recent non-growth in daily active users and time spent as problematic for a business model reliant on top funnel dominance.' Analyst Robin Zhu flagged this concern.

verification.verifier_notes: Growth rates from quarterly earnings releases. Bernstein downgrade from Investing.com coverage.
